excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that structural teacher distillation is standard free decoder-only language modeling
a claim that training-time structural teachers are positional-method promotion evidence by themselves
supported: A no-credential support-complete two-block pointer-generator audit with training-only structural teacher distillation.
Evidence about whether Stage88 structural retrieval routes can be distilled into a free learned decoder evaluated without structural copy routing.

decision.claim_boundary: Structural teacher distillation preserves capacity but does not repair free held-out retrieval generalization.

model.row_policy: train one same-seed model per method on all support-complete Stage10 task train rows; evaluate unchanged original task splits separately
model.support_supervision_policy: support-class auxiliary loss is applied to phase-cued train rows only; evaluation does not receive support labels
model.target_attention_supervision_policy: target-position attention auxiliary loss is applied to retrieval train rows only; evaluation does not receive target_pos, target_delta, or reference_delta
model.teacher_distillation_policy: Stage88 structural copied-token teacher distributions are used on retrieval train rows only; validation and test evaluate the free learned pointer-generator distribution without structural routing
model.trained_parameters: token embeddings, two q/k/v/o attention blocks, vocab output projection, positional scale, copy/vocab gate, support classifier from decoder query state
model.value_output_mode: learned mixture of vocab softmax and copied prefix-token mass

source_rows: stage10 original rows with support-complete same-seed multitask training
